treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Treated 2 cycles of Decitabine with resolution of adenopathy; then treated with a combination of Decitabine and Venetoclax.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Achieved resolution of blasts although with noted ongoing dysplasia on bone marrow biopsy.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Part of protocol for Phase 1 Study of Ipilimumab in Combination with Decitabine.

treatment_timeline.event: Initiated 2 cycles of Decitabine treatment, resolution of adenopathy was noted.
Started treatment with Decitabine and Venetoclax, achieved resolution of blasts with ongoing dysplasia.
Admitted with low-grade fevers and multiple complications transitioned to CMO.
Participated in Phase 1 Study of Ipilimumab in Combination with Decitabine.

patient_outcome.final_status: Not specified directly but transitioned to CMO implying a critical condition.
patient_outcome.complications: Multiple complications including fever, respiratory failure, and possible ongoing leukemia cutis.
